name: Example PR Fix Loop
purpose: Iterate on a pull request until the local test suite and lint command pass, then stop before pushing changes.

trigger.description: Run when a developer asks the agent to keep fixing a PR until local verification passes.

observation.description: Read PROGRESS.md, inspect git status, and run the verifier to identify current failures.

action.description: Make one focused code or test-support change that addresses the highest-confidence verifier failure.

success_condition.description: The verifier exits 0 without skipped checks or weakened validation.
success_condition.check_command: test -f LOOP.md && test -f PROGRESS.md && test -f state.json

failure_condition.description: The verifier cannot run because dependencies are missing, or the same failure remains after the no-progress threshold.

verifier.expected_result: Exit code 0, with test and lint output recorded in PROGRESS.md.

escalation.condition: No-progress threshold is reached, verifier dependencies are unavailable, or a protected verifier path must change.
escalation.message_template: Loop blocked for {loop_name}: {reason}. Last verifier result: {verifier_result}.
